query:
SELECT 
  vc.id, vc.name, vc.role, vc.isLocked, 
  vc.masterPortraitUrl, vc.previewImageUrl, vc.faceVideoUrl,
  vc.enableLipSync, vc.description
FROM video_characters vc
WHERE vc.jobId = 510025
ORDER BY vc.id;
command:
